_comment: Docker-compose overlay applied by docker/entrypoint.py via core.config.deep_merge (the runtime's single recursive merge; the entrypoint reuses it). Flips cloud=true on the desktop_gpu_4090 device profile so the console runs through HedgeLLM (local gemma3:12b + the cloud chain). hedge_delay_ms=50 starts the cloud client almost immediately so the user sees cloud-sourced tokens win the race against the still-warming local model. The merge recurses through sections -> profiles -> sub-sections without stranding siblings, and treats llm.options as opaque. No other change vs the committed config.json. allow_prc is NOT set here: it stays at the config default (false), so the cloud chain is US-only (OpenRouter/Cerebras/Groq) and the PRC-hosted DeepSeek/Moonshot presets stay dropped; set ALLOW_PRC=1 in .env to opt in.
